title: Integrate advertisement placeholders into the gaming website

requirements.summary: Add responsive top sticky banner ad container below navigation bar in RootLayout with desktop/mobile height variants and AdSense/Adsterra integration comments
acceptanceCriteria: Banner renders below the nav bar, not above it
Banner is 90px tall on desktop (≥768px) and 60px tall on mobile
Banner is full width and sticky at the top of the viewport (below nav)
Placeholder shows a colored box labeled 'Ad Space'
Comments clearly mark AdSense and Adsterra integration points
Mobile navigation bar remains visible and compact when the top banner is shown
Banner does not overlap any game UI or nav elements

file_operations.description: Add a top sticky banner ad container below the navigation bar element. The banner must use responsive height classes (60px on mobile, 90px on desktop) and be sticky positioned. Include a colored placeholder box matching the neon dark theme with centered 'Ad Space' text. Add HTML comments marking where to paste Google AdSense and Adsterra scripts. Ensure the navigation bar remains above the banner in the z-index stack and that mobile nav stays visible and compact.

requirements.summary: Add responsive bottom sticky banner ad container in RootLayout that does not overlap gameplay controls
acceptanceCriteria: Banner is sticky at the bottom of the viewport across all screen sizes
Banner is full width and does not overlap on-screen game controls or canvas
Placeholder shows a colored box labeled 'Ad Space'
Comments clearly mark AdSense and Adsterra integration points
Game canvas and controls remain fully accessible above the banner

file_operations.description: Add a bottom sticky banner ad container as the last element in RootLayout. The banner must be full width, sticky at the bottom of the viewport, and use a colored placeholder box with 'Ad Space' text matching the site theme. Include HTML comments marking where to paste Google AdSense and Adsterra scripts. Ensure the banner does not block or overlap any game controls by using appropriate z-index and positioning that keeps it below interactive game elements.

requirements.summary: Implement full-screen interstitial ad overlay system triggered exclusively after full Game Over with auto-close countdown and manual close button, returning user to main menu
acceptanceCriteria: Interstitial overlay only appears on full Game Over, not on mid-game crashes
Overlay is full-screen and covers all content
A visible 5-second countdown is displayed
Overlay auto-closes after 5 seconds
Manual close via X button works at any time
After closing, the player is navigated to the main menu
Placeholder shows a colored box labeled 'Ad Space' with comments for real ad script insertion
Does not block gameplay while active (triggers post-game only)

file_operations.description: Create a reusable InterstitialAd component that renders a full-screen overlay with a colored 'Ad Space' placeholder box, a close button (X) in the top-right corner, and a visible 5-second countdown timer. The component must accept an onClose callback that navigates to the home page. Include HTML comments marking where to replace the placeholder with a real ad script. Use fixed positioning with high z-index to cover all content and style with the neon dark theme.

Integrate the InterstitialAd component to display after a full Game Over event (not mid-game crashes). Add state to track whether to show the interstitial. When the game ends completely, set the state to show the interstitial overlay. Pass an onClose handler that navigates to the home page using the router.

Integrate the InterstitialAd component to display after a full Game Over event (when all lives are lost). Add state to track whether to show the interstitial. When lives reach zero and the game ends completely, set the state to show the interstitial overlay. Pass an onClose handler that navigates to the home page using the router.

requirements.summary: Implement rewarded ad system with 'Watch Ad to Continue' button after crash, showing 5-second countdown and granting 1 extra life, usable once per session
acceptanceCriteria: 'Watch Ad to Continue' button is visible after a crash (not full Game Over)
Button is disabled / hidden if the rewarded ad has already been used this session
Clicking the button shows a 5-second countdown overlay simulating an ad view
After the countdown completes, the player receives 1 extra life and the game resumes
The rewarded ad can only be triggered once per game session
Comments clearly mark where to integrate a real rewarded ad SDK

file_operations.description: Create a RewardedAd component that displays a 'Watch Ad to Continue' button and a 5-second countdown overlay when clicked. The component must accept props for onRewardGranted callback, disabled state, and visibility. The countdown overlay should be full-screen with a colored 'Ad Space' placeholder and timer. Include HTML comments marking where to replace the countdown with a real rewarded ad SDK call. After the countdown completes, invoke the onRewardGranted callback.

Integrate the RewardedAd component to show after a crash (not full Game Over). Add state to track whether the rewarded ad has been used this session and whether to show the ad button. When the player crashes but still has lives remaining, display the 'Watch Ad to Continue' button. On reward granted, add 1 extra life and resume the game. Disable the button after first use in the current session.

Integrate the RewardedAd component to show after a crash (when a life is lost but lives remain). Add state to track whether the rewarded ad has been used this session and whether to show the ad button. When the player crashes and loses a life but still has lives remaining, display the 'Watch Ad to Continue' button. On reward granted, add 1 extra life and resume the game. Disable the button after first use in the current session.

requirements.summary: Ensure all ad placeholder containers use consistent neon-themed styling with no UI overlap and maintain smooth gameplay performance
acceptanceCriteria: All ad placeholders use styled colored boxes with 'Ad Space' text consistent with the neon dark theme
No ad container overlaps the navigation, game canvas, or on-screen controls
Layout is fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
Game frame rate is not negatively impacted by ad container rendering
Game does not reload when any ad closes

file_operations.description: Add reusable CSS utility classes for ad placeholder containers that provide consistent styling across all ad components. Define classes for the colored placeholder box (semi-transparent dark background with neon accent border matching the site theme), centered 'Ad Space' text styling, and responsive height/width utilities. Ensure the styles use existing CSS custom properties for theme consistency.

Apply the new ad placeholder utility classes to ensure consistent neon-themed styling. Verify the overlay uses high z-index positioning that does not interfere with game rendering performance. Ensure the component does not cause any re-renders or reloads when closing.

Apply the new ad placeholder utility classes to ensure consistent neon-themed styling. Verify the countdown overlay positioning does not block game controls or cause frame drops. Ensure smooth transitions and that resuming the game does not reload the page.
